header.title: Your profile.
header.intro: This is what project leads see when you offer to help. Be honest — the more accurate your profile, the better the matches.

identity.title: Tell your story.
identity.desc: A short bio and picture help project leads understand what drives you. What change do you want to be part of?

avatar.label: Profile picture
avatar.hint: Square, at least 256×256. PNG, JPG, WebP or GIF, up to 4 MB.

fields.bioHelp: Two or three sentences. What you care about, what you're working on, what you'd love to do more of.

skills.title: What you bring.
skills.desc: Pick what you’re good at — and tell us whether you actually want projects that need it. It’s fine to be expert at something you’re done with.
skills.empty: No skills yet — add some below or pick from the suggestions.
skills.searchPlaceholder: Add a skill — search by name or category…
skills.allAdded: You’ve added every skill in our catalogue.
skills.noMatch: No skills in our catalogue match <query>“{term}”</query>.

where.title: Location & timezone.
where.desc: Used to surface local projects and to coordinate calls. We never show your exact address — just your city.

appearance.title: Theme.
appearance.desc: Choose how The Superhero looks for you. Your choice is saved to this browser and applies across every page — it isn't tied to the Save button.
